hero.title: Packing Checklist
hero.description: Plan trip packing lists, organize items by category, and track what is packed before departure.

flow.title: Plan → Pack → Review
steps: Add items by category and priority
Mark items packed and review remaining essentials

differences.title: A practical packing workspace
differences.description: Packing Checklist keeps travel preparation focused on saved lists, item readiness, and category coverage.

items.title: Create checklists
items.description: Track destination, dates, trip type, status, and notes for each packing plan.

items.title: Pack with structure
items.description: Add quantities, categories, priority, notes, and packed state for every item.

items.title: Review readiness
items.description: See packed, remaining, completion percentage, and high-priority gaps from stored data.

feel.title: A calm pre-trip checklist
feel.description: The app is designed for quick scanning before a journey, school trip, work trip, camping plan, or relocation.

items.title: Organized
items.description: Categories keep documents, clothing, electronics, medicines, and other essentials easy to review.

items.title: Accountable
items.description: Every progress number comes from saved checklist items.

items.title: Reusable
items.description: Duplicate a previous list and reset packed states for the next trip.

audiences.title: Who uses Packing Checklist
audiences.description: Packing Checklist supports people preparing for trips or moves where forgotten items create friction.

items.title: Families
items.description: Plan shared lists for holidays, school trips, baby items, medicines, and documents.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Prepare work-trip equipment, documents, chargers, and presentation items.

items.title: Travelers
items.description: Reuse packing plans for vacations, camping, sports travel, and relocation.

resourceSection.title: Packing Checklist essentials
resourceSection.description: A protected planner for trip checklists, packing categories, and item readiness.

items.title: Checklist records
items.description: Create, edit, duplicate, archive, restore, and delete packing plans.

items.title: Item tracking
items.description: Add item quantities, categories, priorities, notes, and packed state.

items.title: Progress review
items.description: Track completion percentage, remaining items, and category distribution.

groupedSection.title: From checklist to departure review
groupedSection.description: The workflow moves from a trip plan into item-level packing and progress insight.

items.name: Destination
items.description: Store where the checklist is for.

items.name: Dates
items.description: Track start and end dates when they are known.

items.name: Progress
items.description: Mark packed items and monitor remaining work.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with Ansiversa workflow standards
technicalSection.description: Packing Checklist uses protected API-backed records and a focused frontend module.
items: Overview CTA opens the real checklist workflow.

finalCta.title: Open Packing Checklist
finalCta.description: Start with your saved trip checklists.
